description.prompt.message: Prompt for generating or editing images

description.model.message: Model used for generating or editing images.

description.size.message: Image size. Different models support different presets: 5.0 only supports 2K/3K/4K, 4.5/4.0 supports 1K/2K/4K, 3.0-t2i and seededit-3.0-i2i only support `<width>x<height>` pixels (e.g., 1024x1024, 1280x720). Preset models also allow 'Adaptive' (keep ratio with reference images), or you can enter any `<width>x<height>` directly in the dropdown.

description.watermark.message: Whether to add an AI watermark to the generated image. Enabled by default.

description.imageUrls.message: Upload 1-14 reference images to enable editing.

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter a prompt, e.g., a white Siamese cat

button.confirmContinue.description: Confirm button in capability conflict dialog

button.cancelSwitch.description: Cancel button in capability conflict dialog

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start task. Contact admin:

message.usedUp.message: You’ve used up your credits. Please purchase more to continue.

message.uploadImageExceed.message: You can upload up to 14 images

message.uploadImageError.message: Failed to upload. Please try again later

message.featureNotSupportedBody.message: The current selection does not support the following enabled settings: {fields}. Continuing will clear these settings.

name.maxImages.description: Number of images in multi-image generation (max_images)

description.maxImages.message: Number of images to generate per request (1-15). Set to 1 for single image mode; more than 1 automatically enables sequential image generation, keeping character, style, and details consistent across images. Only supported on doubao-seedream-5.0 / 4.5 / 4.0. If reference images are uploaded, ensure (reference images + generated images) ≤ 15. Billing is based on the actual number of images generated.

description.seed.message: Random seed for reproducibility, range [-1, 2147483647]. -1 means random each time. Only supported by doubao-seedream-3.0-t2i and doubao-seededit-3.0-i2i.

description.guidanceScale.message: Controls adherence to the prompt, range [1, 10]. Higher values follow the prompt more closely. Default: 2.5 for doubao-seedream-3.0-t2i, 5.5 for doubao-seededit-3.0-i2i.

description.outputFormat.message: File format for generated images, jpeg or png. Default is jpeg. Supported only by doubao-seedream-5.0.

size.group.pixel.description: Dropdown group for specific pixel sizes
